titleStmt.title: SII 8.698: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 698. (A.R. No. 384 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . matiraiyu miḻamuṅ koṇṭa ko
pparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10Āvatu Uṟaiyūrkkū
ṟṟattu Allūr Allūr nakkar koyiṟ parame
śva rarkku Allūruṭaiyāṉ Aṟiñcikai pāṇṭaṉ
kuṭutta Ūrkkallāṟ ṟuḷaippoṉ 10� patiṉkaḻaiñcu
m Ivaney Allūr Ūrāriṭai puṉceyttiṭalai cantirā
tittavaṟ Iṟaikāvalākak koṇṭu vayakki nirnila
mākki kuṭutta nilattuk kellaiyum Itaṉ maṇṇilai[ k
ku] Akappaṭṭa kiḻpāṟkellai nantavāṉattukku merkkun teṉ
pāṟkellai muṅkiṟkāṟceykku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kaṭai
yvāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai maṇaṟkāṟceykkum I
taṉmelai Iraṇṭumāviṟku teṟkum Ivvicaitta pe
runāṉkellaiil Akappaṭṭa nirnilaṉ 4 Araimāvum I
taṉ miytu poy Ittevar puṉceyttiṭal ciṟukkaḷa
ñceri tiṭalil Ittevariṭaiyey vilaikoṇṭu vayakki
nirnilamākkik kuṭutta nilattuk kellai kiḻpāṟkkellai I
ttevar puṉceyttiṭalukku merkkun teṉpāṟkellai Itte
var nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Allūr Eṭṭi
kaḷum Allūr naṭṭiyattārka ṇilattukku maṟṟumoḻi
nta nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Allūr madhya
sta n nāṉūṟṟuvan teṟṟi ceykku teṟkum Ivvicaitta
perunāṉkellaiu ḷakappaṭṭa nilaṉ [2�] Ivviraṇṭumā
vum Āka Ivviraṇṭu kiṭakkai nilanumāy � Araikkālum
Ippoṉ yamam Ivvūrp paṭṭuṭaiyār kośi kan Araṅka ṉā
ṉaikkāvaṉum Araṅkan tirumeṟṟaḷiyum kamutuvaṉ viṭamaṅ ka
ṟkaṭaiyum civakocari Ūraṉ Aṟiñcikaiyum Iññālvom I
ppon yama Eṅkaḷ paṅkiṉvacamey Oppukoṇṭu Ippo
ṉnukkup poliyūṭṭākavum Innilam � nāṅkaḷe ko
ṇṭu Ittevarkku ciṟukālaicantiil muṉ
ṟu viḷakku ka cāmamerivatākavum Uccampotuca
ntiyil Aṟunāḻikai Erivatākavum Antiyam po
tu cantiil 1- cāma merivatākavum Ipparicu cantrā tittava
ṟ Erippatākavum . Āṭi Aruḷa ney culanāḻiyāl 2 tiruva
mutarici patteṭṭukkuttal 5 neyamutu Orupiṭiyum mañcaṭkāp
pu Araippalamum kaṟiyamutukku nel Uri tayiramutu Uri Aṭaik
kāyamutu 5 caṅkarāntitoṟum cantirātittavaṟ Ippa
ṭi celuttuvomāṉo mivvaṉaivom .
Ipparicu nicatippaṭi ciṟukālaican=ti yil tirukkā
ppu tiṟantu mutala muṉṟu viḷakku Oru cāma merippatāka
vum Uccampotu can=ti Il Āṟu nāḻikai Erivatākavum .
An=ti yampotu can=ti yi lorucāma merippatākavum . Im
muṉṟu viḷakkum niyatippaṭi Erippatākavum caṅkirān=ti
toṟum Āṭiaruḷa ney cūlanāḻiyāl Irunāḻi yāṭṭuva
tākavu mañcaṭkāpparaippala miṭuvatākavum . tiruvamutarici
patteṭṭukkuttal cūlanāḻiyāl Aiññāḻiyum ne
yyamutu Orupiṭiyum kaṟiyamutukku nel nāḻium tayiramu
tu nāḻium Aṭaikkāyamutu Aiñcum Ilaiamutu O
raṭukkum Ippaṭi can=ti rātittavaṟ Eṅka ḷaccu ṉāpo
kam paṅkiṉavacame Ivvaṟiñcikai pāṇṭaṉ kuṭutta
poṉṉiṉ palicaiyu mivaṉ kuṭutta nilattiṉ kaṭa
maiyum nāṅkaḷey koṇṭu Ippaṭi celuttu
vomāṉo mivvaṉaivom . Itu patmā heśva ra rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.698 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
